heroInsight: Carousels with transformation captions like 'YES I’M CHANGED BECAUSE MY OLD VERSION IS TOO WEAK 💀' are achieving 3x more engagement than average static posts — capitalize on relatability and visual storytelling.

formatPerformance.summary: Carousels are outperforming other formats with a focus on transformation and progress narratives, driving massive saves and DM shares.

data.name: Reel
data.note: Reels maintain stable engagement but lack the spike seen in carousels.

data.name: Carousel
data.note: High engagement due to save and DM share rates, especially with transformational content.

data.name: Story
data.note: Stories see declining engagement, less impactful than carousels for transformation content.

data.name: Static
data.note: Static images are underperforming, lacking the narrative depth of carousels.

trendingHooks.template: POV: You're 3 months into your cut
trendingHooks.example: POV: You're 3 months into your cut and finally see the abs you've dreamed of.

trendingHooks.template: The hardest part is showing up
trendingHooks.example: The hardest part is showing up, but every day builds the body of your dreams.

trendingHooks.template: Feel the burn, love the results
trendingHooks.example: Feel the burn, love the results — leg day never felt this rewarding.

trendingHooks.template: Transformation Tuesday: From weak to warrior
trendingHooks.example: Transformation Tuesday: From weak to warrior, my journey to strength.

trendingHooks.template: Not everyone should train the same
trendingHooks.example: Not everyone should train the same — tailor your workouts to your goals.

postingTimes.summary: Engagement peaks early mornings and evenings on weekdays.

trendingAudio.name: Skyfall (Adele)
trendingAudio.recommendation: Use for dramatic transformation reels showcasing before and after.

trendingAudio.name: Temperature x Sweet Dreams (Altego Mix)
trendingAudio.recommendation: Perfect for high-energy workout montages or cardio sessions.

trendingAudio.name: Hopelessly Devoted To You (Olivia Newton-John)
trendingAudio.recommendation: Best used for softer, routine-based content to avoid overuse.

hotTopics.detail: Highlighting the importance of mental wellness and self-acceptance alongside physical fitness.
Discuss the benefits of training for functionality and how it complements aesthetic goals.
Focus on long-term dietary habits rather than quick fixes, linking to transformation content.
Explore how AI is being used to tailor workouts and track progress more efficiently.
Highlight the psychological benefits of regular training and its impact on mental health.

hashtagIntel.recommendation: Use this for transformation posts to tap into an engaged community.
Perfect for targeting leg day routines and engaging followers interested in lower body workouts.

actionItems.action: Create a carousel post with a dramatic transformation story
actionItems.confidence: high based on current data patterns

actionItems.action: Use 'Skyfall' by Adele for a transformation reel
actionItems.confidence: medium based on trending audio performance

actionItems.action: Engage with followers on functional fitness vs aesthetics debate

critical: DM shares are the #1 signal, prioritize content that encourages sharing
Saves contribute 25% to ranking power, optimize for saves with valuable content
proTips: Lean into carousels for storytelling as they rival Reels in engagement
Focus on raw, real human content over polished AI-generated posts

tiktokCrossover.summary: Currently, there's limited crossover from TikTok due to minimal data; monitor trends closely for early adoption opportunities.
